label: Transparent azalea cluster motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Azalea transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete azalea flower cluster motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A mountain garden azalea cluster with vivid hot-pink blossoms, fresh green leaves, bark-grey twig hints, delicate petals, and natural botanical texture. Crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Composition/framing: centered complete flower cluster cutout with leaves visible and no cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no rhododendron confusion, no rose, no vase, no hand, no props, no landscape.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Azalea light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Azalea, derived from the visible azalea cluster cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished expressive community-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Azalea, Azalea Cluster, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract hot-pink blossom actions, leaf-green success states, petal-white surfaces, bark-grey rules, heather-mauve muted chips, and mountain-garden energy for community, events, groups, and moderation tools.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, profile cards, event cards, tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic pink UI, no unrelated neon palette, no rhododendron confusion, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Azalea.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Azalea dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Azalea that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Azalea, Azalea Cluster, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve blossom-pink actions, leaf-green states, bark-dark surfaces, heather-mauve muted controls, and bark-grey borders for expressive community interfaces.
Constraints: no neon overload, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Azalea.
